title: Coord plan-ledger event
description: One append-only line in state/plans.jsonl. Plan state is event-sourced: the current state of a plan id is the fold of all of its events (see _fold_plans). `as_of`/`note`/`fleet`/`tasks` appear on the propose event; approve/reject events only flip `status` (see COCKPIT_SPEC.md §3.2).

ts.description: Epoch seconds when this event was appended.

id.description: Plan id this event applies to (epoch-ns of the propose event).

as_of.description: desired-state version at the moment of proposal (present on the propose event).

note.description: Free-text note describing the plan's goal (present on the propose event).

fleet.description: The proposed fleet spec (present on the propose event).

tasks.description: The proposed task DAG (present on the propose event).

status.description: Plan status after applying this event.
